items.name: Muscle Tee / Y2K Graphic
items.description:
A staple piece for any streetwear rotation. This sleeveless muscle tee offers a lean, model-like fit that highlights a toned silhouette. Whether you're layering it or rocking it on its own for a bold Y2K aesthetic, this top is a wardrobe essential. Available in solid colors and custom graphic prints.
